JOI-JOI.aromaPrinciple: Empress of the cosmos, wielding the duality of black holes and white holes, commanding both destruction and rebirth across the stars.
JOI-JOI.banter.alive.endTurnPing: The universe waits for no one. Make your move.
JOI-JOI.banter.dead.endTurnPing: Even in silence, the cosmos turns...
JOI-JOI.cardsModifierDescription: Joi cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
JOI-JOI.description: Joi commands the forces of black holes and white holes. She embodies the eternal cycle of destruction and creation, wielding cosmic power to reshape reality itself.
JOI-JOI.eventDeathPrevention: Not yet. The stars have not finished their song.
JOI-JOI.goldMonologue: Even stardust has its value in this realm.
JOI-JOI.title: Joi
